---
title: "09. 刻意、缮性与稀疏规范"
subtitle: "Deliberate Practice, Nature Repair, and Sparse Norms"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 9
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters do not simply reject practice; they reject crowded, exhibitionist, or over-coded practice. That is structurally closest to sparse canonical form: the right repair pattern is minimal, ex..."
---

**Chapters:** 15, 16, 23  
**Omega Directions:** `zeckendorf-representation`, `fold-operator`, `golden-mean-shift`

{{< include articles/category_09_self_cultivation_sparse_norms.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_09_self_cultivation_sparse_norms Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_self_cultivation_sparse_norms_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_self_cultivation_sparse_norms_video.mp4 >}}

**Media Downloads:**

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_09_self_cultivation_sparse_norms_infographic.png)

---

[Back to Zhuangzi Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
